rules.label: 22.A.
rules.html: Observers may be used if desired by the captains or the <dfn data-rule="3.Q.4">event organizer</dfn>.
rules.text: Observers may be used if desired by the captains or the event organizer.

rules.label: 22.B.
rules.html: Observers may perform any or all of the following duties:
rules.text: Observers may perform any or all of the following duties:

children.label: 22.B.1.
children.html: Track time limits and announce associated warnings and expirations.
children.text: Track time limits and announce associated warnings and expirations.

children.label: 22.B.2.a.
children.html: Any <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> directly involved in a dispute may request <dfn data-rule="3.Q.8">observer</dfn> resolution.
children.text: Any player directly involved in a dispute may request observer resolution.

children.label: 22.B.2.b.
children.html: An <dfn data-rule="3.Q.8">observer</dfn> may resolve a dispute without request from the players involved if they cannot resolve it in a timely manner.
children.text: An observer may resolve a dispute without request from the players involved if they cannot resolve it in a timely manner.

children.label: 22.B.2.c.
children.html: If an <dfn data-rule="3.Q.8">observer</dfn> is involved in resolving a dispute, play restarts with a check.
children.text: If an observer is involved in resolving a dispute, play restarts with a check.

children.label: 22.B.3.
children.html: Censure or eject players for Spirit of the Game infractions. This includes assigning responsibility for game delays to a specific <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn>.
children.text: Censure or eject players for Spirit of the Game infractions. This includes assigning responsibility for game delays to a specific player.

children.label: 22.B.4.
children.html: Render opinions on other on-field events (e.g., <dfn data-rule="3.G">line</dfn> and offside calls), as determined in advance by the <dfn data-rule="3.Q.4">event organizer</dfn>.
children.text: Render opinions on other on-field events (e.g., line and offside calls), as determined in advance by the event organizer.

rules.label: 22.C.
rules.html: By playing under observers, the players agree to abide by the observers’ decisions.
rules.text: By playing under observers, the players agree to abide by the observers’ decisions.

rules.label: 22.D.
rules.html: Players may overrule an <dfn data-rule="3.Q.8">observer</dfn>’s active ruling, provided it is to their team’s detriment. Players may also decline enforcement of a yardage penalty assessed through the misconduct system. Observers may deny the declination if they feel the teams are trying to circumvent mandatory tournament rules, guidelines, or <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> safety.
rules.text: Players may overrule an observer’s active ruling, provided it is to their team’s detriment. Players may also decline enforcement of a yardage penalty assessed through the misconduct system. Observers may deny the declination if they feel the teams are trying to circumvent mandatory tournament rules, guidelines, or player safety.
